name: Strawberry Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve cornstarch in orange liqueur.
2. In a pot over medium heat, combine the remaining ingredients.
3. Cook until the berries are very soft, about 10 minutes.
4. Add the cornstarch mixture; cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce just thickens, about 3-4 more minutes.
5. Allow to cool completely.
Makes 16 servings. Per serving: 41 calories, 0g protein, 0g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 10g carbohydrates, and 1mg sodium.
